title: crotalaria assadii
intro: Crotalaria assadii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea family. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of West Africa. Traditionally, Crotalaria assadii has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anthelmintic properties, which help to expel intestinal worms. The health benefits of Crotalaria assadii include reducing inflammation, acting as a diuretic, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, and it can be prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion.
